# Scene Tree Management

> Hierarchical scene graph and node management

**Category:** Ui · **Version:** 1.0.0 · **Tags:** ui · godot

## What this does

Hierarchical scene graph and node management

Specifies 6 acceptance outcomes that any implementation must satisfy, regardless of language or framework.

## What must be true

- **implementation:** Feature implemented in C++ engine core
- **platform_agnostic:** Works across desktop, web, mobile platforms

## Success & failure scenarios

**✅ Success paths**

- **Node Creation** — when Instantiate new nodes is requested, then Instantiate new nodes completed.
- **Parent Child Relationships** — when Build node hierarchy is requested, then Build node hierarchy completed.
- **Node Naming** — when Name and reference nodes by path is requested, then Name and reference nodes by path completed.
- **Node Traversal** — when Find nodes via queries is requested, then Find nodes via queries completed.
- **Node Groups** — when Group nodes for batch operations is requested, then Group nodes for batch operations completed.
- **Scene Instantiation** — when Load scene files into tree is requested, then Load scene files into tree completed.
